The '''''Aegis''-class Combat Shuttle''' was a ship-to-surface combat transport employed produced by the [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]].

==Characteristics==
''Aegis''-class shuttles were designed around delivering troops and vehicles directly onto an active battlefield. Towards this end each shuttle had two airlocks on either side which could open up in seconds to form unloading ramps. The two sets of laser cannon turrets and concussion missile launchers provided covering fire while troops were disembarking.<ref name="ROE">''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''</ref>

Within its transport compartment an Aegis could carry three light combat vehicles, two medium combat vehicles, one compact heavy vehicle, or up to forty soldiers and their gear.<ref name="ROE" />
